arcs.description: Read the desk-open flag without consuming it.

description: A circulation desk checks out a held book only while the desk is open. The desk-open flag is READ (test-without-consume): the checkout is gated on it but must not remove it, so the desk stays open for the next patron.
name: library-hold

places.description: Holds one desk_status token iff the circulation desk is open.
places.name: desk_open

transitions.description: Convert a hold into a loan while the desk is open.
transitions.name: check_out
